channel.title: RSV on México Pathogens Portal
channel.description: Recent content in RSV on México Pathogens Portal

item.title: RSV
item.description: Virus Provides information on RSV circulation in Mexico, including weekly cases, seasonal distribution, and transmission patterns across children and adults. The purpose is to strengthen epidemiological surveillance, identify periods of higher risk, and deliver key data for outbreak prevention and control. google RSV v1.1 Syntax Description Header Title Paragraph Text
